#2045 — snapshot-anchored dedup

cc-triage snaps the LLM's reference_changelog_line to the deterministic snapshot bullet, so the dedup hash stops drifting on rewording. Type a reworded ref and watch it snap.
→
Threshold = 0.6 token-Jaccard. Below it the ref is left unchanged (no forced match — same bounded fallback as today). Exact/verbatim refs snap as a no-op, so existing issues never re-file. Hashes shown are a toy 32-bit digest for illustration, not the real sha256.
